localized_texts.text: Step into Johor’s ultimate football adventure with the JDT Full Experience Package! Enjoy a luxurious JDT Hummer limousine ride around Stadium Sultan Ibrahim, featuring VIP comfort, plush seating, and stunning stadium views. Go behind the scenes with the JDT Stadium Tour, exploring the players’ lounge, changing rooms, warm-up area, and standing pitch-side where history is made. Top it off with the JDT Buggy Tour, a self-drive experience through Parking Zone 3, perfect for friends and family seeking fun, speed, and Instagram-worthy moments. One ticket, one day, three unforgettable experiences — the perfect way to celebrate football, luxury, and excitement all in one visit.
Luxurious Hummer Limousine Ride – Enjoy VIP comfort and stunning views of Stadium Sultan Ibrahim in a JDT-themed limousine.
Exclusive Stadium Tour – Go behind the scenes of Johor Darul Ta’zim FC, including players’ lounge, changing rooms, warm-up area, and pitch-side access.
Thrilling Buggy Adventure – Self-drive JDT-themed electric buggies through Parking Zone 3, perfect for family and friends.
One-Day All-in-One Experience – Complete all three tours in a single visit for maximum fun and convenience.
Instagram-Ready Moments – Every corner offers photo-worthy spots, day or night, creating unforgettable memories.
What’s included: JDT Full Experience Package Ticket
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter

Terms & Conditions: Each ticket is valid for one person only. The ticket is valid for one-day use only; all three experiences (JDT Hummer Tour, Stadium Tour, and Buggy Tour) must be completed on the same day. Total estimated duration for all activities is approximately 4 hours. Tickets cannot be split across multiple days. Guests must arrive at least 30 minutes before the first tour activity for registration and briefing. For the Hummer Limousine Ride, guests should arrive 10 minutes before boarding. Children under 12 must always be accompanied by an adult. Hummer Limousine Ride: accommodates up to 12–15 passengers (adults + children) per session; additional guests will be scheduled for the next available session. Buggy Tour: maximum 4 adults per buggy, or 3 adults + 2 children, depending on size/weight. Stadium Tour: access may be restricted in certain areas due to maintenance or private events. Follow all instructions provided by staff. Reckless driving, unsafe behavior, or failure to comply with staff instructions may result in termination of the activity without refund. Smoking, eating, and drinking are prohibited inside the Hummer Limousine. Guests must not enter restricted areas and should handle all vehicles, equipment, and seating with care. Damages due to negligence may incur repair charges. Large bags and backpacks are not allowed inside the stadium; storage is available at the ticket counter. Comfortable clothing and non-marking shoes are recommended. Photography is allowed in most areas; please follow the guide’s instructions. Activities may be rescheduled or delayed due to weather, technical issues, safety reasons, official events, or unforeseen circumstances. On match days or special events, ticketing counters or activity areas may be relocated. If guests do not accept the rescheduled time, tickets can be exchanged for another product of equal value. Tickets are non-refundable and non-transferable once purchased. Rescheduling is allowed at least 24 hours in advance, subject to availability. No refunds will be issued for no-shows or late arrivals. Visitors join all activities at their own risk. The organizer is not liable for injury, loss, or damage resulting from failure to follow safety instructions or misuse of vehicles/tour facilities. Guests must treat all vehicles, equipment, and property with care. Pets are not allowed on the Buggy Tour or inside the Hummer Limousine. Maintain cleanliness and dispose of litter responsibly
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
